scripts.test:e2e:ai-live: node scripts/test/require-live-ai-flag.mjs && E2E_AI_MODE=live tsx scripts/test/run-suite.ts e2e --tag ai-live
scripts.test:postrelease: npm run test:smoke:remote && npm run test:report:postrelease && npm run test:gate:postrelease

scripts.test:release:automated: npm run test:local:full && npm run test:e2e:full && npm run android:verify:candidate
scripts.test:release: npm run test:release:automated && npm run test:report:release && npm run test:gate:release
